editionData.title: May 20, 2026: Pentagon says U.S. will cut thousands of troops from Europe; Admiral accuses lawmaker of ‘inappropriate’ remark at...
editionData.description: Global headlines: Pentagon says U.S. will cut thousands of troops from Europe (Poland was set to receive forces whose deployment was abruptly halted last week); Admiral accuses lawmaker of ‘inappropriate’ remark at Iran war hearing (Adm. Brad Cooper, the head of U.S. Central Command, appeared frustrated with questions from House Democrats who pressed him on a range of issues about the conflict); and As Putin visits China, distrust simmers beneath an anti-U.S. alliance (Back-to-back visits to Beijing by the American and Russian presidents are highlighting how China's Xi Jinping is the world leader to be reckoned with and courted). Markets leaned lower, with 6 of 7 tracked indexes down; Nikkei 225 down 1.30% was the largest move. Benchmarks tracked: S&P 500, NASDAQ Composite, Euronext 100 Index, and Public Joint-Stock Company Moscow Exchange MICEX-RTS plus 3 more indexes. Hacker News: Railway Blocked by Google Cloud (We are investigating a widespread service disruption affecting Railway. Users may be experiencing errors including "no healthy upstream",...); Gemini 3.5 Flash (At Google I/O we released Gemini 3.5, our latest series of models combining frontier intelligence with action); and I’ve built a virtual museum with nearly every operating system you can think of (Over 1,700 pre-installed operating systems spanning 1948 to today, in a single Linux VM. Bundled QEMU, VirtualBox, and UTM. One-click...). Product Hunt features PollyReach (Give your agent a real number and voice to make calls), Drizz (Mobile tests that write, run, and fix themselves), and Monocle 3.5 for macOS (Noise-cancelling for your  screen).
editionData.author: Sony Mathew

headlines.title: Pentagon says U.S. will cut thousands of troops from Europe
headlines.summary: Poland was set to receive forces whose deployment was abruptly halted last week.

headlines.title: Admiral accuses lawmaker of ‘inappropriate’ remark at Iran war hearing
headlines.summary: Adm. Brad Cooper, the head of U.S. Central Command, appeared frustrated with questions from House Democrats who pressed him on a range of issues about the conflict.

headlines.title: As Putin visits China, distrust simmers beneath an anti-U.S. alliance
headlines.summary: Back-to-back visits to Beijing by the American and Russian presidents are highlighting how China's Xi Jinping is the world leader to be reckoned with and courted.

headlines.title: A ship’s crew risked the Strait of Hormuz. They met with a hail of bullets.
headlines.summary: After a month stranded, a ship's Filipino crew voted under mounting pressure to risk the perilous six-hour journey, made treacherous by mines and Iranian attacks.

headlines.title: How Bumpy the orphaned hippo sparked joy amid tragedy
headlines.summary: A baby hippo rescued from beside his mother’s body in Kenya is now thriving, and keepers hope to reintroduce him to the wild one day.

headlines.title: Nigeria says joint US strikes kill 175 ISIL fighters in country’s northeast
headlines.summary: Nigerian Army lauds joint US operation as part of ongoing military campaign to 'hunt down and kill terrorists anywhere'.

headlines.title: US President Trump, family granted immunity from pending tax audits
headlines.summary: Democratic lawmakers blast move, which follows the establishment of a controversial 'Anti-Weaponization Fund'.

headlines.title: US Senate advances resolution to curb Trump’s power to wage war on Iran
headlines.summary: Vote to advance War Powers Resolution seen as rare rebuke of the president as pressure grows to end US attack on Iran.

headlines.title: Iran warns of ‘surprises’ if war resumes; Vance signals progress in talks
headlines.summary: Warning comes after Trump threatened military action against Iran and gave it 'two to three days' to strike a deal.

headlines.title: Putin meets Xi: Why Russia and China need each other
headlines.summary: Vladimir Putin’s arrival was announced just a day after United States President Donald Trump left Beijing.

headlines.title: In Georgia, two GOP Trump backers vie to face former Atlanta mayor for governor
headlines.summary: Georgia is a swing state where both Democrats and Republicans are deciding the direction their parties will take in the fall in races for the senate and the governor's mansion.

headlines.title: U.S. government to drop tax claims against Trump in broadening of IRS settlement
headlines.summary: As part of the settlement agreement, the U.S. is "forever barred and precluded" from examining or prosecuting President Trump, his sons and the Trump organization's current tax issues, according to a document posted to the DOJ website.

headlines.title: Endorsed by Trump, Ed Gallrein defeats Rep. Thomas Massie in GOP House primary
headlines.summary: In a major victory for President Trump, his hand-picked challenger, Ed Gallrein, beat out U.S. House Rep. Thomas Massie in a Kentucky House GOP primary, ending Massie's reelection bid.

headlines.title: 'Taiwan Travelogue' wins the 2026 International Booker Prize
headlines.summary: The novel is the first work translated from Mandarin Chinese to win the award, which celebrates its 10th anniversary this year.

headlines.title: Trump endorses Ken Paxton over incumbent John Cornyn in Texas Senate primary runoff
headlines.summary: President Trump has endorsed Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton over incumbent Sen. John Cornyn in the Texas GOP runoff for U.S. Senate, one week before voting ends in the contentious and expensive primary.

headlines.title: Putin hails 'unprecedented level' of ties
headlines.summary: Russian President Vladimir Putin arrived in Beijing on Tuesday night for a two-day state visit to China, marking his 25th trip to the country since assuming the presidential office in 2000.

headlines.title: Putin arrives in Beijing for state visit to China
Chinese songs contest UK semifinal held in London
headlines.summary: The UK semifinal of the "Cultures of China·Water Cube Cup" Chinese Songs Contest 2026 was held in London on Saturday.

headlines.title: Greenland reiterates island 'not for sale'
headlines.summary: Officials from Greenland have repeated that the Danish territory will never be for sale during talks over the future of the Arctic island with the special envoy of United States President Donald Trump.

headlines.title: China's multilateral approach commended at forum
headlines.summary: China's initiatives to promote multilateral cooperation and governance contribute to global peace and development toward a shared future, experts said at a forum in Hong Kong on Tuesday.

headlines.title: Church leaders meet Naga group in attempt to mend fences with the Kuki-Zo
headlines.summary: Church leaders engage with Naga leaders to promote peace in Manipur amid ongoing tensions and hostage crises.

headlines.title: Caste slurs in Census forms: SC Commission issues notice to Punjab Census office
headlines.summary: SC Commission issues notice to Punjab over caste slurs in Census 2027 forms, demanding action in 15 days.

headlines.title: Modi and Meloni outline road map for India-Italy strategic partnership
headlines.summary: Prime Minister Narendra Modi and Italian Premier Giorgia Meloni joint op-ed talks about emerging “Indo-Mediterranean” corridor and pushes for €20-billion bilateral trade target by 2029.

headlines.title: Commitment to democracy makes India, Nordic nations natural partners: Modi
headlines.summary: Modi emphasises shared democratic values as India and Nordic nations forge a 'Green Tech and Innovation Strategic Partnership' for sustainability.

headlines.title: PM Modi skips questions from press; Norwegian PM Store says ‘different traditions’
headlines.summary: MEA defends India's democracy amid PM Modi's European tour, facing press criticism for not holding conferences in Norway.

headlines.title: Xi, Putin to meet in Beijing for tea diplomacy after Trump visit
headlines.summary: Reuters: Xi, Putin to meet in Beijing for tea diplomacy after Trump visit.

headlines.title: US Senate advances measure curbing Trump's Iran war powers
headlines.summary: Reuters: US Senate advances measure curbing Trump's Iran war powers.

headlines.title: Exclusive: US plans to shrink forces available to NATO during crises, sources say
headlines.summary: Reuters: Exclusive: US plans to shrink forces available to NATO during crises, sources say.

headlines.title: Trump tells Fed to consider fintech access to payment accounts
headlines.summary: Reuters: Trump tells Fed to consider fintech access to payment accounts.

headlines.title: Vance says 'a lot of progress' made in Iran talks
headlines.summary: Reuters: Vance says 'a lot of progress' made in Iran talks.

markets.label: Public Joint-Stock Company Moscow Exchange MICEX-RTS

hackerNews.title: Railway Blocked by Google Cloud
hackerNews.summary: We are investigating a widespread service disruption affecting Railway. Users may be experiencing errors including "no healthy upstream", "unconditional drop overload", login failures, and inability to access the dashboard. We are actively investigating and will provide updates as soon as possible.

hackerNews.title: Gemini 3.5 Flash
hackerNews.summary: At Google I/O we released Gemini 3.5, our latest series of models combining frontier intelligence with action.

hackerNews.title: I’ve built a virtual museum with nearly every operating system you can think of
hackerNews.summary: Over 1,700 pre-installed operating systems spanning 1948 to today, in a single Linux VM. Bundled QEMU, VirtualBox, and UTM. One-click launchers for Windows and Linux.

hackerNews.title: Google changes its search box
hackerNews.summary: We shared the next step in our journey to bring together the best of a search engine with the best of AI.

hackerNews.title: Ben Welsh made an index of all FiveThirtyEight articles on the Internet Archive
hackerNews.summary: An index of every fivethirtyeight.com article preserved by the Internet Archive.

hackerNews.title: Remove–AI–Watermarks – CLI and library for removing AI watermarks from images
hackerNews.summary: CLI and library for removing visible (Gemini) and invisible (SynthID, C2PA, EXIF) AI watermarks from images - wiltodelta/remove-ai-watermarks

hackerNews.title: OpenAI Adopts Google's SynthID Watermark for AI Images with Verification Tool
hackerNews.summary: OpenAI advances AI content provenance with Content Credentials, SynthID, and a verification tool to help people identify and trust AI-generated media.

hackerNews.title: Show HN: Forge – Guardrails take an 8B model from 53% to 99% on agentic tasks
hackerNews.summary: A Python framework for self-hosted LLM tool-calling and multi-step agentic workflows - antoinezambelli/forge

hackerNews.title: Mistral AI acquires Emmi AI
hackerNews.summary: European AI leader Mistral AI is acquiring Emmi AI in one of Europe’s most important and strategic AI acquisitions to date.

hackerNews.title: GitHub is investigating unauthorized access to their internal repositories
hackerNews.summary: The AI-powered developer platform to build, scale, and deliver secure software.
